# ciscosecureaccess_network (Resource)

Cisco Secure Access Network resource

## Schema

### Required

- `is_dynamic` (Boolean) Whether or not the network has a dynamic IP address
- `name` (String) Name of network
- `prefix_length` (Number) Prefix length of network
- `status` (String) Status of network, must be OPEN or CLOSED

### Optional

- `ip_address` (String) IP address of network

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Date and time when the network was created
- `id` (Number) Unique origin ID of network

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```
terraform import ciscosecureaccess_network.example 12345
```
